title: Nishir Daak
subTitle: Shreemoyee is convinced that Rudro cheated on her with Nishi and is unfaithful towards her. Nishi capitalises on the situation and creates further misunderstandings between the couple. Will Shreemoyee and Rudro see through Nishi's tricks?

title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
subTitle: Bamakhyapa, a saint living in the 18th century, is a great devotee of Goddess Tara. Though he is against the unconventional orthodox temple practices, he uses his divine powers to help the needy.

title: Ponchomi
